# Conventions

<!-- Generated by dotnet-ai-kit. Codex applies these globally (no per-file scope). -->

## security

# Security (universal)

- Use parameterized queries; never concatenate SQL.
- No hardcoded secrets or connection strings; read from configuration.
- No `async void` (except event handlers); no empty `catch` blocks.
- Validate and encode all external input.

## error-handling

# Error Handling (domain)

- Match the project's existing error model: `Result<T>` OR exceptions + ProblemDetails — not both.
- Throw for truly exceptional cases; return `Result`/typed failures for expected ones.
- Never swallow exceptions; preserve the stack and add context.
